title: Plus One
prompt:
You are given a large integer represented as an integer array `digits`, where each `digits[i]` is the `i`th digit of the integer. The digits are ordered from most significant to least significant in left-to-right order. The large integer does not contain any leading zeros.

Increment the large integer by one and return the resulting array of digits.

examples.output:
[1, 2, 4]
Explanation: The array represents the integer 123. Incrementing gives 124.

constraints: digits does not contain any leading zeros

notesForAI.coreIdea: Start from the last digit and add one. If it becomes 10, set to 0 and carry over. Continue until no carry remains. If carry propagates past the first digit, prepend a 1.
commonBugs: Converting to integer which may overflow for very large numbers
Forgetting to propagate the carry through all digits
